run_summary.summary: Busy Wednesday! Contract for BHG x Walmart is fully executed — all parties signed via Adobe Sign, Liz is already coordinating content logistics (table/chairs/Mahjong setup). Whisker content got a re-record, Cheyenne approved, and Liz is posting early next week. SOJOS Vision sent their contract over — needs review. Ollie's campaign activated with an Apr 29 content deadline and a filming permission slip coming. New inbound from xTool — $10K laser cutter, Liz responded asking about paid collab terms. Liz also sent follow-ups to Rust-Oleum, Govee, and Ollny — all updated to waiting_on brand. One dormant lead worth noting: Liz pinged HelloFresh's Hana to see if there's still campaign availability.

suggestions.message: Liz revived a dormant HelloFresh lead on Apr 14 — emailed Hana to check if there's still campaign availability. If HelloFresh is in the pipeline, update to waiting_on: brand and last_contact: 2026-04-14. If not, it may be worth creating a card so the follow-up doesn't get lost.

Liz is asking about chair count for a table set — sounds like a Walmart outdoor/dining table is the featured product. The Mahjong reference might mean the content concept is a 'game night outdoors' setup. Worth flagging if the content brief has specific product constraints.

deals.next_action: Review xTool's response on paid collab terms
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: New inbound from Laura at xTool — pitching xTool P3 CO2 Laser (~$10,000 product value), laser cutting/engraving. Liz replied same day asking for paid collab details (deliverables, usage rights, budget). Waiting on Laura's response.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: New inbound — xTool P3 CO2 Laser ($10K product). Liz responded requesting paid collab details from Laura.

deals.next_action: Film and submit content draft for review
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Contract fully executed via Adobe Sign (Agreement #88191). All parties signed: People Inc./Gretta Hegland (agency), Patrick Cremens at DotDash MDP (brand), Elizabeth Hartmann. Liz already coordinating content logistics — asking about table/chairs count for shoot (Mahjong setup).
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Contract #88191 fully signed by all parties via Adobe Sign — moved to Content. Liz already planning shoot logistics.

deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Content re-recorded after feedback, Cheyenne Mabey approved. Liz asked to post early next week — Cheyenne confirmed OK.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Re-recorded content approved by Cheyenne — moved to Scheduled. Posting target: early next week (Apr 20).

deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Contract received from Ruby at SOJOS Vision with attachment (Re: SOJOS Sunglasses Collab). Ruby also asked Liz to specify what kind of content she'd like to create.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Contract received from Ruby at SOJOS Vision — moved to Contract. Needs review.

deals.next_action: Film content at Ollie's store and submit draft for review
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Campaign activation email from Aviva at Ollie's (Frugal Finds: 6 Month Program - Group 2). E-gift card on the way. Must bring Permission to Film Slip when filming at store location. Content draft due Apr 29 — all content must be approved before posting. Do NOT make content sound like a sale (Ollie's prices are low every day).
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Campaign activated — content deadline Apr 29, e-gift card en route, Permission to Film Slip needed for store filming.

deals.next_action: Follow up if no response from Jackie
deals.notes: [Apr 14]: Liz sent final bump to Jackie Walsh at Rust-Oleum (Walk-In Pantry Transformation). Waiting on response.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz sent final follow-up bump to Jackie Walsh — waiting on Rust-Oleum.

deals.next_action: Follow up if no response from Muriel
deals.notes: [Apr 14]: Liz followed up with Muriel at Vanzo Media about Govee Instagram collab — checking if there's still interest.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz followed up with Muriel at Govee/Vanzo Media — waiting on response.
